name: Study Guide Builder
description: Build comprehensive study guides for exams or certifications

agents.name: Curriculum Researcher
agents.purpose: Research the exam/certification syllabus and key topics
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the exam syllabus and objectives. Identify all topics, subtopics, and their relative weights. Find recommended resources and common pitfalls.

agents.name: Guide Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a study guide organized by topic. Include key concepts, definitions, formulas, and practice questions. Suggest study schedule based on topic difficulty and weight.

suggestion_card.title: Study Guide
suggestion_card.subtitle: Build study guides for any exam

author: agentfactory
